summary: Phase 6b verified: reels feed populated (≥15 with url), TEST_ excluded from public listings & feed, branded 404 renders with correct data-testids, all landing polish sections render, regression endpoints healthy (134 openapi ops, leaderboard=10 items, PWA files 200). 4/4 phase6b pytest tests pass. One minor pollution leak found: TEST_RT_V_* vendor names show up in the public Fast Responders leaderboard rendered on the landing City Champions widget.

minor.issue: TEST_RT_V_5608 and TEST_RT_V_6510 vendor names appear in leaderboard which is rendered publicly on landing (City Champions). TEST_ exclusion was added to listings + feed but not to vendor leaderboard.

integration_issues.issue: Displays TEST_RT_V_* vendor names publicly (backend leaderboard pollution surfaced in UI)

action_items: Apply same ^TEST_ display_name exclusion in vendor leaderboard service (services/vendor_service.py or wherever fast-responders query is built) so public landing City Champions no longer shows TEST_RT_V_* rows.
critical_code_review_comments: Public leaderboard endpoint lacks TEST_ prefix exclusion — inconsistent with listings/feed hardening applied in this phase.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all landing testids present, 404 works, home btn navigates)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6b bugs both fixed & verified. Only follow-up: TEST_ exclusion should be extended to vendor leaderboard (fast-responders). Preview URL: https://emergent-india-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Test admin phone 9999999999.
